text:

Author: emaste

Log:
  revert r338726 (getdirentries capsicum addition)

  Compat getdirentries was added with the ino64 project and is not needed
  in stable/11.  I MFC'd r335900 accidentally as a side effect of some
  other WIP.

  PR:		228671

Changes:
_U  stable/11/
